display_text: Black Grimoire, Tier Special / Non-Purchasable: Right-click to consume all stored charges, granting 200 experience per charge. Starts on cooldown. Gains charges from kills and assists, empowering your hero with bonus experience to accelerate leveling. This item cannot be dropped. Stats: CD: 420s, XP per charge: 200.
